source: Aggregated TI feeds (MISP, AlienVault OTX, PhishTank, URLScan, internal)

queried_indicators.notes: Newly registered domain spoofing Microsoft branding. URLScan capture from 2026-05-14 shows pixel-perfect clone of Microsoft 365 login page with credential POST to /oauth/verify endpoint. Tied to phishing kit known as 'EvilProxy v3' which can also bypass MFA via session token theft. PhishTank confirmed report 2026-05-14T22:11Z.
Bulletproof-adjacent hosting provider repeatedly seen hosting short-lived phishing infrastructure.

campaign_observability_internal: This is the 4th distinct EvilProxy v3 campaign observed targeting your organization in 2026. Prior campaigns also quarantined successfully. No historical credential compromise from this kit.
